response:
Veda Hlubinka-Cook designed and created the computer game "D/Generation" and was technical director for the computer game "The Last Express." She was also the model for one of the characters in Jordan Mechner's game "Prince of Persia."

In the context provided, the 1997 video game that takes place on the Orient Express, days before the start of World War I, is **The Last Express**. Veda Hlubinka-Cook played a role in its development as a designer and technical director.
